instruction: Design a 7-day road trip itinerary across the US West Coast. Include major cities, national parks, and activities for each day, along with estimated driving distances. Ensure that the keyword "national parks" appears before "major cities" in the itinerary description. Provide detailed reasons for selecting each destination and activity, including historical or cultural significance, natural beauty, or recreational opportunities. Write all text in lowercase, and the response must contain exactly 14 sentences, with each day’s description limited to 2 sentences. Use the phrase "breathtaking landscapes" exactly three times throughout the itinerary. Maintain an enthusiastic and adventurous tone throughout the response. Write all text in sentence case.
response:
day one starts with exploring the breathtaking landscapes of yosemite national parks before heading to the major cities of san jose for urban adventures.
day two drives through sequoia national parks to marvel at giant trees, then arrives in fresno where you can enjoy local cuisine and history.
day three takes you to the breathtaking landscapes of redwood national parks for towering trees, followed by a visit to the major cities of sacramento for its rich political heritage.
day four cruises along the pacific coast highway near san francisco, offering breathtaking landscapes and views of the golden gate bridge in this major city.
day five explores the rugged beauty of big sur, a lesser-known gem that complements the nearby major cities with stunning coastal drives.
day six visits the breathtaking landscapes of channel islands national park for unique wildlife, then returns to los angeles to experience its vibrant major city culture.
day seven concludes with a final look at the starlight theater in los angeles, wrapping up an epic journey through national parks and major cities.
this itinerary balances natural wonders with urban excitement, ensuring every traveler finds something unforgettable along the west coast.
each destination was chosen for its distinct character, from ancient forests to modern skylines that define american diversity.
the driving distances are optimized to minimize fatigue while maximizing time spent enjoying the incredible scenery and cultural sites.
historical landmarks and recreational trails provide endless opportunities for learning and physical activity throughout the entire trip.
photographers will be thrilled by the dramatic lighting and diverse environments captured in these breathtaking landscapes.
families will appreciate the mix of educational stops and fun activities suitable for all ages and interests.
adventurers will love the challenging hikes and scenic routes that test their limits while rewarding them with spectacular views.
this carefully planned route guarantees a memorable experience filled with discovery, beauty, and the thrill of the open road.

Conflicts between Format Constraints.new_constraint: Write all text in sentence case.
